title: 25.6in Artificial Red Berry Stems, 6pcs Long Stem Christmas Holly Berry Branches Red Berries Picks Foam Burgundy Berries Sprays for DIY Xmas Tree Craft Wedding Holiday Season Winter Home(Red)
features: Lifelike Design: These berry stems are carefully crafted with attention to detail, providing a lifelike appearance that is sure to impress. The foam burgundy berries are beautifully arranged on long stems, creating a lifelike and eye-catching display. Whether used in wreaths, centerpieces, or garlands, these stems will add an authentic touch to your Christmas decorations.

Durable and Long-lasting: Made from high-quality materials, these berry stems are built to last. The sturdy construction ensures that they can withstand the test of time, allowing you to enjoy their beauty for many holiday seasons to come. Whether used indoors or outdoors, these stems will maintain their vibrant red color and shape, adding a touch of elegance to your Christmas decor.

DIY Friendly: For those who enjoy crafting and personalizing their holiday decorations, these berry stems are the perfect choice. The long stems allow for easy manipulation and arrangement. Use them to embellish your Christmas tree, create custom wreaths, or add a festive touch to gift wrappings. The possibilities are endless!

Versatile Decoration: The 25.6in length of these berry stems makes them versatile for various decoration purposes. They can be easily incorporated into wreaths, garlands, and floral arrangements, instantly transforming any space into a winter wonderland. Whether you're sprucing up your living room, office, or event venue, these stems will bring the holiday atmosphere to any setting.

Suitable for Christmas Enthusiasts: The 25.6in Artificial Red Berry Stems cater to a wide range of Christmas enthusiasts. Whether you're a DIY hobbyist, a winter holiday enthusiast, or someone looking to add a festive ambiance to your home, these stems are an excellent choice. Their versatility and durability make them suitable for individuals who enjoy decorating their homes during the winter holiday season.
description: Featrues: 1. Each berry branch is about 65cm tall. Note: It will bend to 55 cm for easy transportation. 2. Artificial red berries are made of durable foam balls. Branches can be slightly bent for decorating. 3. Beautiful and realistic red berries are perfect for decorating Christmas trees and Christmas wreaths. Added a changed holiday atmosphere. 4. Also suitable for New Year's decorations, holiday, home, party, wedding ornaments. 5. Very beautiful in color, durable in feel. It requires no maintenance to keep its color and lifelike appearance. Perfect for Merry Christmas, New Year, Thanksgiving Day gifts. Specification Material: Foam Color: Red Size: 65cm Package Include: 6pcs × Artificial Berry Branches
